ownership.load_phase: stream loader owns write ports; APU core is idle
ownership.run_phase: APU control owns feature reads/writes and weight reads; stream loader is blocked
ownership.result_phase: result streamer owns one feature read port while APU core is idle

risks: WorkSheet counts write transactions and requires contiguous address-zero programming
FeatureProcessor and WeightSRAM reads are synchronous with one-cycle latency
APU computation and DMA loading must not access the same memory concurrently
InBuf behavior must remain bit-exact with the existing regression
